title: Ryanair Holdings PLC Announces £40 Million Expansion At Prestwick Maintenance Facility

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair Holdings PLC Announces £40 Million Expansion At Prestwick Maintenance Facility. Ryanair Holdings PLC announced a £40 million expansion of its maintenance facility at Prestwick Airport, which will see the construction of...
